title: Foxbook /api/v1/claim/by-handle response (v1)
description: Read-only response shape for GET /api/v1/claim/by-handle/:asset_type/:asset_value. Returns the claim row + (when applicable) the latest agent-key-registration leaf index in the transparency log. Cache-Control: public, max-age=60, must-revalidate (per ADR 0007).

verification_tier.description: 0 = unclaimed/pending. 1 = tier1_verified (Gist). 2 = tier2_verified (DNS or endpoint). 3+ reserved for future tiers.

leaf_index.description: Latest agent-key-registration leaf index in the transparency log. Present only when the claim is in tier1_verified or tier2_verified state.

inclusion_proof_url.description: Convenience: the public Worker URL for the inclusion proof at leaf_index. Present only when leaf_index is present.

revoked.description: Always false in v1 — revoked claims are deleted from the claims table per ADR 0004 addendum-1, so a 200 response from this endpoint always describes a non-revoked claim. The field is surfaced for forward compatibility with a future soft-revoke path.
